name: InstaLoan
description_short: At 13825 SW 88th St in Miami, FL, InstaLoan offers same-day payday and title loans.
description_long:
InstaLoan operates at 13825 SW 88th St in Miami, Florida. This standalone storefront in the Tamiami area is convenient for West Miami residents needing quick access to payday and title loans. Monday through Friday the location is open 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM, and Sunday 11 AM to 5 PM.

At the 13825 SW 88th St location in Miami, InstaLoan provides payday loans and title-secured financing. Whether you need quick cash for an emergency expense or a bridge loan, the team here can help. Call +1 305-752-9555 to speak with a representative about your options and application process.

If you're a Miami resident needing fast funds, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a blank check or debit card information to your appointment. InstaLoan serves the immediate cash needs of South Florida communities with flexible terms designed for your situation.
pros: Cash available in as little as 30 minutes according to multiple customer reviews
Bilingual staff (English and Spanish) at Miami Gardens location
Multiple loan products available (signature loans and title-secured loans)
Online application options available to start the process remotely
Credit score plays only a small factor in title loan approval process
Extended weekday hours (9 AM - 7 PM Monday-Friday)
5.00/5 average rating across 1,585+ Google reviews with specific staff praise
Flexible payment options advertised as more manageable than payday loans
cons: Signature loans capped at $250 in Florida, insufficient for many emergency expenses
No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on website, making true cost opaque
Title loans require vehicle collateral with risk of repossession if payments missed
Requires proof of income within last 40 days, excluding self-employed or irregular income earners
Limited availability - only physical storefront locations (no indication of multiple Miami locations despite URL suggesting potential network)
best_for: Consumers with vehicles seeking larger emergency loans who can use collateral
Spanish-speaking borrowers in the Miami Gardens area needing fast cash
Workers with recent, documented income seeking loans under $250 quickly
Individuals who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans due to credit issues
diagnosis: InstaLoan is best for employed consumers in the Miami area with vehicles who need emergency cash within hours and can document recent income, but cannot qualify for traditional loans. The primary caveat is that loan costs (APR and fees) are not transparently disclosed on their website, and signature loans are capped at a very low $250 limit, making them only useful for minor emergencies.
services: Title-secured first lien loans based on vehicle value
Auto insurance facilitation for title loan applicants without coverage
In-person loan processing at physical storefronts
Store locator service for multiple locations
meta_description: Miami, FL: InstaLoan at 13825 SW 88th St. Same-day payday and title loans.
